base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of message_box_banner_jp — a ui (dialog) from 1986 dragon quest. Japanese '勇者門惡龍' (Yongzhe Menyouling = dragon-slaying hero) banner variant — localization for Chinese/JP region. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Japanese '勇者門惡龍' (Yongzhe Menyouling = dragon-slaying hero) banner variant — localization for Chinese/JP region
